target_window.selection_rule: Use FightOdds EventsRecentQuery with dateGte=2023-01-01, dateLt=2023-05-06, orderBy=-date, filter promotion slug/shortName to UFC, dedupe repeated event PKs, and import the unique UFC events before the current corpus.
target_window.rationale: D2-MIX can score only 26 model-eligible events after requiring 100 prior market-covered training samples. Four more model-eligible events are required to cross the 30-event stability floor; importing the 14-event pre-May-2023 UFC window should provide enough prior market-covered fights with buffer for unmatched or cancelled bouts.
